name: INTERVERTEBRAL DISK
chapter: DIFFERENTIAL DIAGNOSIS OF SKULL AND SPINE DISORDERS
definition: gaslike density due to liberation of nitrogen gas from surrounding tissues into clefts with an abnormal nucleus

obscured on upright radiograph during spine flexion
